sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n20821" key="bra/sswn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βράσσων</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, Homeric <gramGrp opt="n" TEIform="gramGrp"> <gram type="comp" opt="n" TEIform="gram">Comp. of</gram> </gramGrp> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">βραχύς</foreign> (q. v.).</entryFree>
